title: www.drybulkETF.com - December 22, 2020
summary: Santa Claus rally for Capesizes, January should see better rates - A counter seasonal rally has developed in the Iron ore prices to the moon - Iron ore is by far the best performing major commodity this year. A perfect storm 2021 should be a good year - The prospects for 2021 look promising. Vale, the Brazilian miner, remains optimistic
